words: This is the sixth conversation with EUGENE SETTLE and took place under the willow
tree in his backyard in Moscow on August 9, 1978. The interviewer was SAM SCHRAGER.

speaker: ES

words: them where they were segregated, you know, they wouldn't take 'em

speaker: ES

speaker: ES

speaker: ES
